author: gb9t
content: Iter 84 result: drivers/md/dm-verity.md (authenticated read - dm-verity-target.c ~1838 + dm-verity-fec.c ~734 + dm-verity-verify-sig.c ~199; per-target Merkle-tree per-block hash + walk leaf→root → root_digest comparison + per-CPU shash tfm pool + optional FEC Reed-Solomon recovery + signature-based root-hash gating + ERROR/RESTART/IGNORE/PANIC modes + Loadpin LSM integration; AVB + ChromeOS + immutable-distro use case) + virt/kvm/x86-msr.md (VMX MSR autoload + pass-through bitmap - in vmx.c ~300-400 lines; per-vCPU msr_autoload host+guest 8-slot lists for VM_ENTRY_MSR_LOAD/_EXIT_MSR_STORE_LOAD + 4KiB MSR_BITMAP with 4 sub-bitmaps R/W × low/high MSR + dynamic toggle for LBR/PEBS/x2APIC pass-through + IA32_SPEC_CTRL pass-through). 118 Tier-3s total. Next iter: drivers/md/dm-clone.md (efficient block-level data cloning) + virt/kvm/x86-host-irq.md (host-IRQ delivery to guest via posted-IRQ + irqfd integration).
